record.field: Renew commercial registers, chamber of commerce certificates, and related external governance documents without losing audit traceability.
1. Check expiry date and renewal window. 2. Collect supporting documents. 3. Submit to the competent authority and record references. 4. Archive the renewed copies and notify the record owner.
Track the renewal of diesel supply for plant operations and keep replenishment evidence in the operational file.

1. Verify plant consumption and minimum stock. 2. Raise the replenishment request and confirm supplier availability. 3. Coordinate delivery and on-site receipt. 4. Record the delivery evidence and close the cycle.
Recurring task package for commercial register, chamber of commerce, and related external document renewals.
Seeded as the first canonical example of a cross-domain task template anchored to a function and linked to an SOP.
Recurring operational task package for monitoring diesel stock and coordinating replenishment for treatment plant operations.
Represents the granular task layer beneath the site support function.
